## Company

## What is wrong

- [ ] Wrong sector tags
- [ ] Wrong stage
- [ ] Wrong city / country
- [ ] Wrong website
- [ ] Wrong summary
- [ ] Should not be on the map at all

## What it should be

Provide the corrected values, with a source if possible.

## Source

URL or citation supporting the correction.
